title: 🌊 EMOTIONAL WAVE PROFILE
content:
🌊 EMOTIONAL WAVE PROFILE
There are 3 primary wave types—yours is tied to the Solar Plexus Center, and likely expresses as a "build and crash" wave (from Channel 59–6 + Gate 36):
Stage
Description
Your Experience
High Crest
Excited, passionate, optimistic
“This is it! Let’s go now!”
Dip
Moody, uncertain, withdrawn
“I’m unsure. Maybe this is all wrong.”
Neutral Clarity
Balanced, uncharged, calm awareness
“It’s neither good nor bad. It just is.” ✅ Decision point🔁 TIMING RULE:
Never decide in the crest or dip. Wait for the neutral.
This applies to:
• Creative project launches
• Commitments or collaborations
• Spending money
• Saying yes to opportunities
• Declaring ideas “finished”
🧰 WORKFLOW INTEGRATION
🌒 DAILY SYSTEM ALIGNMENT:
Morning / Early Wave • Ideal for generating ideas • Not for choosing between them
• Free-write, sketch, riff
Afternoon / Mid-Wave • Might feel moody or flat • Rest, archive, light structure
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 28 (chunk 28/57)
